overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a misty forest trail. The clip shows overcast morning lighting with dense woodland vegetation and includes a brief encounter with an NPC villager before continuing into darker, denser woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: temperate forest trail with mixed oak and pine trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the forest, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and stones
large gnarled oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
tall evergreen pine trees forming the forest backdrop
tall green grass and ferns lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks alone along a winding forest path during an overcast morning. The trail is surrounded by dense green undergrowth and mixed woodland, with a large twisted oak tree visible ahead on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching a large landmark tree with NPC encounter

events.description: villager in red shirt becomes visible standing on the right side of the path ahead
Geralt passes the stationary villager on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a villager standing on the path edge while navigating around a large tree

notable_agents.action: villager in red plaid shirt standing on the path side, facing toward the forest

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the trail, he approaches a villager in a red shirt standing near a large twisted oak tree. He passes the NPC and a mossy boulder on the right, moving deeper into the woodland where the canopy becomes denser.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense old-growth forest with thick canopy and atmospheric fog

events.description: ambient light decreases significantly as the path enters a denser section of forest with thicker canopy cover

agents.ego_description: walking alone through increasingly dark and dense forest, with mist visible in the distance

entered.detail: thick overhead canopy blocking most of the sky, creating a darker atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The trail continues into a darker, denser section of old-growth forest where the canopy blocks most light. Mist hangs in the air between the tall pines, and the surroundings become noticeably dimmer and more enclosed as Geralt walks onward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that transitions from an overcast morning woodland into a dim, enclosed old-growth forest. It begins with Geralt walking through dense green undergrowth and mixed woodland, moving toward a large twisted oak tree visible ahead. As he continues, the camera passes a villager in a red shirt and a mossy boulder, shifting deeper into the woods where the canopy begins to thicken. The scene then opens into a darker section of the forest as the overhead branches block out the light, allowing mist to settle between tall pines. Finally, the surroundings become noticeably dimmer and more oppressive as the trail leads further into the enclosed shadows of the ancient trees.
